LanguageData.ClashOfRim_CaravanDeliveryPoint.label: caravan delivery point
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_CaravanDeliveryPoint.descript: Marks where caravan-delivered goods should arrive. Without a delivery point, goods are placed at the map edge or near the center.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_DefensePoint.label: defense point
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_DefensePoint.description: Sets how a colonist defends when another colony attacks. Assign one colonist, then choose hold, defend, assault, or operate nearby defensive equipment.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MechDefensePoint.label: mech defense point
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MechDefensePoint.description: Sets how a mech defends when another colony attacks. Assign one mech, then choose hold, defend, or assault.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_AchievementTrophy.label: achievement trophy
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_AchievementTrophy.description: A memorial trophy for a multiplayer achievement. It records the achiever and achievement details. It cannot be packed, only deconstructed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_AchievementTrophyPlan.label: achievement trophy plan
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_AchievementTrophyPlan.descrip: A plan for a multiplayer achievement trophy. Select it to choose material and place a buildable achievement trophy blueprint.
